feed.title: cpprefjp - C++日本語リファレンス

entry.title: format -- format : サンプルコードの出力を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/format/format.md b/reference/format/format.md
index b4265b9d8..be84af4fe 100644
--- a/reference/format/format.md
+++ b/reference/format/format.md
@@ -581,11 +581,11 @@ int main()
 
 #### 出力
 ```
-[1, 2, 3]
-[3, 2, 1]
-[1, 2, 3]
-{1: "aaa", 2: "bbb"}
-{1, 2, 3}
+queue: [1, 2, 3]
+priority_queue: [3, 2, 1]
+stack: [1, 2, 3]
+flat_map: {1: "aaa", 2: "bbb"}
+flat_set: {1, 2, 3}
 ```
 
 ### `vector<bool>`を出力する (C++23)

entry.title: コルーチン [P0912R5] -- サンプルコードの include 不足のエラーを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/lang/cpp20/coroutines.md b/lang/cpp20/coroutines.md
index 5a7597d9b..cfea5ce92 100644
--- a/lang/cpp20/coroutines.md
+++ b/lang/cpp20/coroutines.md
@@ -220,6 +220,8 @@ Promise型のスコープにおいて、非修飾な`get_return_object_on_alloca
 ```cpp example
 #include <iostream>
 #include <coroutine>
+#include <new> // std::nothrow
+#include <exception> // std::terminate()
 
 // メモリ確保が必要となったときは::operator new(size_t, nothrow_t)が使われる
 struct generator {
@@ -455,6 +457,7 @@ _p_ をコルーチンPromiseオブジェクトのlvalue名とすると、`co_re
 #include <iostream>
 #include <coroutine>
 #include <utility>
+#include <exception> // std::terminate()
 
 // コルーチン利用ライブラリ: ジェネレータ型
 struct my_generator {

entry.title: set_intersection -- サンプルコードの include 不足のエラーを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/algorithm/ranges_set_intersection.md b/reference/algorithm/ranges_set_intersection.md
index f349845a7..f335372be 100644
--- a/reference/algorithm/ranges_set_intersection.md
+++ b/reference/algorithm/ranges_set_intersection.md
@@ -144,6 +144,7 @@ set_intersection_result {
 #include <iostream>
 #include <set>
 #include <algorithm>
+#include <iterator> // std::inserter()
 
 int main()
 {

entry.title: barrier -- サンプルコードの include 不足のエラーを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/barrier/barrier.md b/reference/barrier/barrier.md
index e4c8dca89..de2898af3 100644
--- a/reference/barrier/barrier.md
+++ b/reference/barrier/barrier.md
@@ -87,6 +87,7 @@ namespace std {
 #include <barrier>
 #include <iostream>
 #include <thread>
+#include <mutex>
 
 constexpr int NWORKERS = 2;  // ワーカ数
 constexpr int NPHASES  = 3;  // フェーズ数

entry.title: coroutine_handle -- サンプルコードの include 不足のエラーを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/coroutine/coroutine_handle.md b/reference/coroutine/coroutine_handle.md
index 630932db7..303dc8a36 100644
--- a/reference/coroutine/coroutine_handle.md
+++ b/reference/coroutine/coroutine_handle.md
@@ -114,6 +114,7 @@ C++コルーチンとC API（コールバック関数へのポインタと`void*
 #include <coroutine>
 #include <iostream>
 #include <utility>
+#include <exception> // std::terminate()
 
 struct task {
   struct promise_type {

entry.title: coroutine_traits -- サンプルコードの include 不足のエラーを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/coroutine/coroutine_traits.md b/reference/coroutine/coroutine_traits.md
index 3c2a8c0e7..c583c37de 100644
--- a/reference/coroutine/coroutine_traits.md
+++ b/reference/coroutine/coroutine_traits.md
@@ -35,6 +35,7 @@ using promise_type = typename R::promise_type;
 #include <coroutine>
 #include <iostream>
 #include <utility>
+#include <exception> // std::terminate()
 
 struct task;

entry.title: noop_coroutine -- サンプルコードの include 不足のエラーを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/coroutine/noop_coroutine.md b/reference/coroutine/noop_coroutine.md
index 2d90f81e8..4dc5b693d 100644
--- a/reference/coroutine/noop_coroutine.md
+++ b/reference/coroutine/noop_coroutine.md
@@ -33,6 +33,7 @@ noop_coroutine_handle noop_coroutine() noexcept;
 #include <coroutine>
 #include <iostream>
 #include <utility>
+#include <exception> // std::terminate()
 
 struct task {
   struct promise_type {

   struct promise_type {

entry.title: last_write_time -- サンプルコードの include 不足のエラーを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/filesystem/directory_entry/last_write_time.md b/reference/filesystem/directory_entry/last_write_time.md
index ddcc12fb3..417417271 100644
--- a/reference/filesystem/directory_entry/last_write_time.md
+++ b/reference/filesystem/directory_entry/last_write_time.md
@@ -32,6 +32,7 @@ file_time_type last_write_time(std::error_code& ec) const noexcept; // (2)
 #include <iostream>
 #include <filesystem>
 #include <fstream>
+#include <sstream>
 #include <ctime>
 #include <iomanip>

entry.title: shared_mutex -- サンプルコードの include 不足のエラーを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/shared_mutex/shared_mutex.md b/reference/shared_mutex/shared_mutex.md
index ced29b2ea..8c4397c30 100644
--- a/reference/shared_mutex/shared_mutex.md
+++ b/reference/shared_mutex/shared_mutex.md
@@ -64,6 +64,7 @@ namespace std {
 ```cpp example
 #include <iostream>
 #include <thread>
+#include <mutex>
 #include <shared_mutex>
 #include <chrono>

entry.title: shared_timed_mutex -- サンプルコードの include 不足のエラーを修正
jthread -- サンプルコードの include 不足のエラーを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/thread/jthread.md b/reference/thread/jthread.md
index ccbb51401..200c6c6f4 100644
--- a/reference/thread/jthread.md
+++ b/reference/thread/jthread.md
@@ -128,6 +128,7 @@ int main()
 ```cpp example
 #include <cassert>
 #include <thread>
+#include <stop_token>
 
 int main()
 {

entry.title: 推論補助 -- サンプルコードの include 不足のエラーを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/tuple/tuple/op_deduction_guide.md b/reference/tuple/tuple/op_deduction_guide.md
index 051298d9a..74ef0c189 100644
--- a/reference/tuple/tuple/op_deduction_guide.md
+++ b/reference/tuple/tuple/op_deduction_guide.md
@@ -46,6 +46,7 @@ namespace std {
 ```cpp example
 #include <tuple>
 #include <type_traits>
+#include <utility> // std::pair
 
 int main()
 {

entry.title: operator~ (単項) -- サンプルコードの include 不足のエラーを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/valarray/valarray/op_flip.md b/reference/valarray/valarray/op_flip.md
index d529dd076..39c0199a4 100644
--- a/reference/valarray/valarray/op_flip.md
+++ b/reference/valarray/valarray/op_flip.md
@@ -36,6 +36,7 @@ return result;
 #include <cassert>
 #include <valarray>
 #include <cstdint>
+#include <algorithm> // std::all_of()
 
 int main()
 {

entry.title: get_stop_source -- jthread::get_stop_source : サンプルコードを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/thread/jthread/get_stop_source.md b/reference/thread/jthread/get_stop_source.md
index 303b755fc..2e408332f 100644
--- a/reference/thread/jthread/get_stop_source.md
+++ b/reference/thread/jthread/get_stop_source.md
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@ int main()
 
   // 別スレッドを立てて、そのスレッドからjt1スレッドに停止要求を発行する
   std::jthread jt2 {
-    [ssource = jt1.get_stop_source()]() {
+    [ssource = jt1.get_stop_source()]() mutable {
       ssource.request_stop();
     }
   };

entry.title: out_of_range -- out_of_range : サンプルコードを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/stdexcept/out_of_range.md b/reference/stdexcept/out_of_range.md
index 8ba8b233a..26d03814e 100644
--- a/reference/stdexcept/out_of_range.md
+++ b/reference/stdexcept/out_of_range.md
@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@ int main() {
   try {
     std::cout << vec.at(3) << "\n";
   } catch (const std::out_of_range& e) {
-    std::cerr << e.wnat() << "\n";
+    std::cerr << e.what() << "\n";
   }
 }
 ```

entry.title: 推論補助 -- basic_string : サンプルコードを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/string/basic_string/op_deduction_guide.md b/reference/string/basic_string/op_deduction_guide.md
index 138cf80c9..f2801cd17 100644
--- a/reference/string/basic_string/op_deduction_guide.md
+++ b/reference/string/basic_string/op_deduction_guide.md
@@ -89,7 +89,8 @@ int main()
   static_assert(std::is_same_v<decltype(s5), std::basic_string<char>>);
 
   // string_viewからの推論
-  std::basic_string s6 = "Hello"sv;
+  // explicit なので ="Hello"sv とはできない
+  std::basic_string s6("Hello"sv);
   static_assert(std::is_same_v<decltype(s6), std::basic_string<char>>);
 }
 ```
